name: Zhejiang Yiming Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yiming Food Co., Ltd. is engaged in the production, processing, and sales of various food products, primarily focusing on snack foods and confectionery products. Based in Zhejiang, China, the company offers a range of snacks, candies, and other related food items to consumers. They aim to provide tasty and convenient food options for the market.
